textByHashes.53f41867123d60cd113a079261eaf207f1902155: I could really do with your help, but the Duke hasn't given me permission to talk to you.
textByHashes.cb44282f5ed0e6a1c3b556372e211753f9b0f1bd: Oh bother, oh bother, oh bother, I'm in a terrible terrible mess! It's the annual Egg Descendance Day tomorrow, and I should be making him a big carrot cake.
textByHashes.c053f9fdf0208e8e91c1c8169b7ffd26ea6e7e11: I've forgotten to buy the ingredients. I'll never get them in time now. The duke will turn me into soup! What will I do? I have 12 children to look after. Would you help me? Please?
textByHashes.69ea902c8fb67585439c8ca5143c304a200b43de: Oh thank you, thank you. I need a carrot, a cabbage and a cake. I'd be very grateful if you can get them for me.
textByHashes.12160e005eae6dfa09d45956876720fd402af942: That's an odd coincidence... Were you planning on making a carrot cake too?
textByHashes.48fd87ae839ba3540ff1c28ac3311b615d1326b3: Well thank you! Hand them over, please.
textByHashes.bfd3fcdcfc984b5faf02c834392931ab815c81cb: You've brought me everything I need! I am saved! Thank you!
textByHashes.3e34e71eda3b74458c7f0c8f2306a085cd854d5b: I'm afraid not, only the big carrots get to dine with the egg.
textByHashes.93b5f85f17f78f6c523644b69abe20823ef61921: It's something rabbits are constantly munching on, have a look in some of the houses nearby.
textByHashes.72bc2409af7ee727456e8632e81cf8031207d49a: Who cares, Descendance day is far more important than their needs.
textByHashes.37b044bc03fa2fad470376734499137456cf398f: I normally get my cabbage from the fields, on the other side of the river.
textByHashes.875b16bff32707d491513734bf5bd6ecee20e326: That you'll have to have a nosey round for, rabbits around here are always celebrating something.
textByHashes.269887b8661a09602eb03a5e027974bb8a074122: You gotta do what you gotta do.
textByHashes.bf5f1112ccd1f1e993e0428b77f386679095e27e: Fine. I always knew you Adventurer types were callous rabbits. Go on, hop off!
textByHashes.a3a13654b59b097d5986263ceb3f80eb1fe29588: No, I'm not. The world is caving in around me - I am overcome by dark feelings of impending doom.
textByHashes.37af831624cc7a1a131d86ea600e5b5878880185: No, that's the worst thing I could do. I'd get in terrible trouble.
textByHashes.bbc8099bb7c55559587dc6316e2591bc7ef7b91b: That would be nice, but the great round one has banned all consumption of Cabbage flavoured drinks.
textByHashes.b0f49577868fd60342b906b72151a7bbe823949d: Have you tried Onion beer? It's disgusting.
textByHashes.50ad82ca30f8d65cde925618fd2215f9d91d1ea4: Err thank you, it's a pretty ordinary rabbit cook's hat, really.
textByHashes.f6ad8588e8aed96cc5486125be8732cbff71bd28: It's all standard rabbit cook issue uniform...
textByHashes.df6c7f7982d368a2f67d120960ae01a95ae4bf1e: I am a real rabbit cook! I haven't got the time to be chatting about Rabbinary Fashion. I am in desperate need of help!
textByHashes.11a0b5e7fb4a0b6859c35fe5f832db04a8e77257: Please get the ingredients quickly. I'm running out of time! The Duke will throw me into the streets!
textByHashes.cf47099b0d8b035711eaa84204e9b41055785039: Thanks for ingredients you have got so far, please get the rest quickly. I'm running out of time! The Duke will throw me into the streets!
